setup.title: Setup
setup.desc: Microphone, API credentials, and system permission status.

mic.title: Microphone
mic.deviceHint: Follows the system default input device.

credentials.title: API Credentials · Doubao
credentials.testHint: Enter creds then Test Connection to verify + save

provider.title: Provider · Doubao Seed
provider.languageHint: Model natively supports zh/en code-switching; zh-CN covers most cases.
provider.showUtterancesHint: Debug only; UI does not consume

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.hotkeyHint: Press and hold to record, release to finalize. Customization not supported in this version.
behavior.openAtLoginHint: Run whoosh in the background at system startup.
behavior.showHudHint: Off = no visual feedback while recording.

logs.title: Logs & Privacy
logs.desc: No telemetry, no crash reports. Logs stay local.
logs.verboseWarn: ⚠ Includes transcribed text for debugging — keep off unless reproducing an issue.
logs.crashHint: No remote endpoint. Attach logs manually when filing bugs.
logs.clipboardHint: Writes carry ConcealedType / TransientType markers, kept out of clipboard history.

step1.label: Step 01 · Credentials
step1.title: Connect to Doubao Seed ASR
step1.desc: Find the fields under Volcano Engine console → Service Management → Streaming Speech Recognition 2.0. API key encrypted via safeStorage; never uploaded.

step2.label: Step 02 · Microphone
step2.title: Allow whoosh to access the microphone
step2.desc: Audio is sent only to the configured ASR provider; not cached locally (unless Verbose logging is on); never sent to any other server.
step2.name: Microphone access
step2.hint: Clicking Grant will trigger the system prompt once.
step2.deniedHint: Denied; open System Settings → Privacy → Microphone, allow Electron, then come back.

step3.label: Step 03 · Accessibility (macOS only)
step3.title: Allow global hotkey and keyboard injection
step3.desc: macOS requires Accessibility permission to listen for the global Right Option key and to simulate ⌘V paste.
step3.name: Accessibility access
step3.hint: Click Open System Settings → check whoosh → come back and click Restart
step3.warn: After granting, app will restart to load the keyboard listener. Progress is saved.

step4.label: Step 04 · Try it
step4.title: Speak or type
step4.desc: Hold {{triggerKey}} and speak, or type directly. Any non-empty text finishes the setup.
step4.placeholder: Hold {{triggerKey}} to speak — text will paste here · or type directly
